title: Register
description: Sent by a plugin instance immediately after the WebSocket handshake. Identifies the instance to the standalone so it can be reconciled across reconnects.

instanceId.description: Stable UUID, persisted in the plugin state. Survives DAW project save/reload.

format.description: Plugin format. Standalone is for headless testing.

role.description: Position role of the instance in the DAW signal flow.

trackName.description: Best-effort track name. Falls back to a user label or auto-assignment when the host does not expose it.

isFirstInChain.description: True when the instance is the first plugin slot on its track and therefore sees the raw signal.

pluginVersion.description: Semantic version of the plugin build.
